products.title: Buy Badam Sharbat Online – Homemade Almond Drink (Lahore)
products.description:
Currently Available for Summer Orders – Limited Stock! Order Online or Visit Our Lahore Store Today.

Almonds are renowned for their nutrient density, protein, healthy fats, fiber, vitamins, and minerals which support overall well-being. From heart health to skin care to strengthening bones to maintaining digestion, almonds provide a delicious way to achieve your health goals.

The quickest and yummiest way to enjoy all these benefits is Badam Sharbat.

Why Our Badam Sharbat is Special

  • Refreshing & Satisfying: Perfect escape from the heat; revitalizing and delicious.

  • Nutritious Nectar: Packed with essential nutrients like protein, fiber, and healthy fats.

  • Health-Conscious Choice: A wholesome option for those prioritizing well-being.

  • Versatile & Convenient: Enjoy as a standalone drink or mix with chilled milk.

  • Heritage & Tradition: Inspired by age-old family recipes.

How to Enjoy:
Add 2–3 tablespoons to chilled water or ice-cold milk and stir — instantly refreshing!

Ingredients: Almonds, Cardamom, Sugar — No Artificial Colors, Flavors, or Preservatives

Product Information Table

Net Weight Approx. 750ml (Bottle)

Quality No Artificial Colors, Flavors, or Preservatives

products.title: Chanay Spicy
products.description:
Spicy chanay is a type of savory snack. It typically consists of fried chickpeas that are seasoned with a variety of spices to create a flavorful and spicy taste. 

Spicy chanay are often enjoyed as a crunchy and satisfying snack on their own, or they may be included as a component in a larger snack mix called Nimko. 

It is a favorite choice for munching during tea time or while traveling. Its spicy flavor profile and crunchy texture make it a popular choice among those who enjoy bold and flavorful snacks.

products.title: Chatkharedar Butter Chicken
products.description:
Creamy Butter Chicken Box Patties, which would make your mouth melt just by the sight of them, are exceptionally tempting. Mouth watering combination of butter, tomatoes & chicken with a touch of yogurt gives it an exclusive taste. An item you won’t regret buying.

Ingredients:
- Butter
- Tomatoes
- Chicken
- Yogurt
- Spices

products.title: Chatkhar_e_Dar Dal Chana
products.description: Dal Chana nimko is a yummy snack loved by millions all over Pakistan. It's made from split chickpeas called chana dal. It's crunchy and spicy, perfect for munching. People enjoy it with tea or at parties.

products.title: Chatpati Imli Chatni – Homemade Tamarind Chutney in Lahore
products.description:
Our Chatpati Imli Chatni brings you the same homemade tamarind flavour that started in our kitchen years ago.
Crafted in small batches to keep it fresh, it’s made from real tamarind, natural sugar, and hand-blended spices for the perfect sweet and tangy balance.

It pairs beautifully with Bhallay, Phulki & Pakori and adds the right desi flavour to Bhel Puri & Malai Bhallay. Every spoonful brings out the authentic taste of homemade chutney you grew up loving.

Prepared with natural ingredients and no artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives, our Imli Chatni offers freshness and purity in every batch.

Available for online orders and in-store purchase in Lahore to make your Chaat Papri, Samosas, and Snacks even more delicious! 

🛍️ Available for Online Order & In-Store Purchase in Lahore

Product Name Chatpati Imli Chatni – Homemade Tamarind Chutney
Net Weight 375g (Approx.)
Ingredients Imli (Tamarind), Sugar, Desi Spices
Quality No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives
Packaging Sealed glass jar for freshness
Availability Online & In-Store (Lahore)

products.title: Chewra Salted
products.description: Salted Chewra is a tasty snack that's perfect for munching! It's made from crunchy flattened rice, yummy peanuts, and just the right amount of very light salt. Grab a handful for a delicious treat during snack time or whenever you're feeling hungry. With Salted Chewra, snack time is always fun!

products.title: Chewra Sweet
products.description: Discover the irresistible Sweet Chewra from Karachi Nimko Chatkharay Achar. This Meetha chewra nimko is made with rice flakes (Powa), Peanuts, cinnamon, Khus khus, and Sesame seeds with a touch of sugar & light spice. This crunchy chewra nimko treat is perfect for satisfying your snack cravings. Order online now for easy delivery in Lahore!

products.title: Chili Chips /  Spicy Potato Sticks
products.description:
Chili chips, also known as Spicy Potato Sticks are a type of snack food made from thin slices of potatoes that have been fried until crispy. These chips are seasoned with chili powder, these spicy chips tend to have a crispy texture and a spicy, savory flavor. These stick shaped potato chips can be a good alternative for someone looking for a more intense flavor experience than traditional potato chips, as well as for those who enjoy spicy food. 

Taste & Texture:

Spicy seasoned, crisp & crunchy.

Storage:

Store in a cool, dry place. Once opened, keep sealed in an airtight container to maintain crunchiness.

products.title: Chocolate Chai
products.description: Experience Chocolate Aroma Tea — a rich chocolate-flavoured tea with smooth black-tea depth and a warm, dessert-like finish. Perfect for those who enjoy strong chai but want a hint of chocolate sweetness in every sip. Brew it with milk or water, enjoy it light or creamy — either way, it delivers a premium chocolate aroma tea experience that feels indulgent, cozy and addictive. Ideal for daily use, gifting, winter evenings or guests.

products.title: Corn Puffs – Light & Crunchy Corn Snack
products.description:
Indulge in the golden crunch of Corn Puffs, one of the most popular snacks from Karachi Nimko Lahore. Made from high-quality corn and fried to perfection, each puff delivers a light, airy texture with a hint of savory flavor that melts in your mouth.

Perfect for tea time, school breaks, movie nights, or casual gatherings — Corn Puffs are loved by kids and adults alike for their crisp texture and mild, addictive taste.

Taste & Texture:

Lightly seasoned, crisp, and perfectly airy — melts in your mouth with each bite!

Storage:

Store in a cool, dry place. Once opened, keep sealed in an airtight container to maintain crunchiness.

products.title: Crispy Pops – Light & Crunchy Fried Papad Snack
products.description:
Discover the irresistible crunch of Crispy Pops, the perfect tiny-sized fried papad snack from Karachi Nimko Chatkharay Achar Lahore.

These small, golden, and light snacks deliver a delicate crisp and mild salty flavor that everyone loves. Ideal for tea time, kids’ lunch boxes, or family gatherings — Crispy Pops bring that authentic desi nimko experience in every handful.

Made from premium papad base and fried to perfection, they’re light on oil but big on flavor, making them a must-have for any snack table.

Taste & Texture:

Crispy, golden, and mildly seasoned — every pop delivers a satisfying crunch that pairs perfectly with tea or cold drinks.

Storage:

Store in a cool, dry place. Reseal after opening to maintain crispiness.

products.title: Crunchy Bhel Puri (Pre Mixed Pack)
products.description:
Our pre-mixed Bhel Puri base takes the effort out of snacking. Just add fresh salad and chatneys to enjoy! This ready-made pack consists of:

  • Papri
  • Bareek Sev
  • Rice Flakes / Puffed Rice / Murmura

to have an Instant Bhel Puri dish.
 Want to customize your mix ? View our full Bhel Puri Ingredients Collection here."

You can always visit us at our Defence Chowk, Lahore store for a fresh pick-up!"

products.title: Crunchy Gathia
products.description: Enjoy premium Gathia from Karachi Nimko Chatkharay Achar (KNCA). Made with gram flour Cumins & light salt. This soft yet crunchy nimco snack is a customer favorite. Order online now for easy delivery in lahore and a delicious snacking experience!

products.title: Crunchy Pakora Mix
products.description: Assorted spices mixed with basin. Just add water, vegetables or edibles of your choice and fry. Enjoy Super Duper mouth watering Crunchy Pakoras with ease & on time.

products.title: Crunchy Rings – Fried Papad Snack
products.description:
Enjoy the satisfying crunch of Crunchy Rings, freshly fried and packed with the authentic taste of Karachi Nimko Chatkharay Achar Lahore.

Each bite delivers that perfect crispy, light, and savory flavor Pakistanis love in their favorite nimko snacks. Made with premium ingredients and fried to golden perfection, these papad-style rings are perfect for tea time, movie nights, or family gatherings.

Whether you’re serving guests or craving a quick snack, Crunchy Rings are the delicious way to add crunch and joy to any moment.

Taste & Texture:

Crispy, golden, and mildly seasoned  – the perfect balance of crunch and flavor.

Storage:

Keep sealed in an airtight jar or bag after opening to preserve freshness. Store in a cool, dry place.

products.title: Crunchy Salted Peanuts
products.description:
Nothing brings a family gathering together like the sound of a fresh crunch. Whether it’s a chilly winter evening under the blankets or a lively tea-time conversation with guests, our Crunchy Salted Peanuts are the traditional heart of the home. Golden-fried for a deep, satisfying snap, they are the perfect companion for long nights and warm stories.

The Ultimate Crunch Factor

Most store-bought peanuts feel dry or dusty. These desi peanuts are prepared using a traditional method that locks in natural oils, delivering a deep, satisfying crunch in every bite. The result is a hearty snack that stays fresh, flavorful, and crisp from the first handful to the last.

Why They Belong in Your Home:

  • The Traditional Tea-Time Partner: Perfectly seasoned to complement a hot cup of tea or coffee during afternoon visits.

  • The Ultimate Book Reading Companion: The perfect "slow snack" for your quiet hours. Clean to handle and deeply satisfying, they provide the perfect crunch while you’re lost in your favorite chapter.

  • The Winter Essential: A hearty, protein-rich snack that has been a staple of winter gatherings for generations.

  • Made for Sharing: Our whole, premium peanuts are a proud addition to any guest tray or family snack bowl.

  • The Ultimate "Blanket" Snack: Clean, savory, and extra-crunchy—the mess-free snack you need while huddled up with friends and family during the holidays.

Note to our regulars: These are the same peanuts you’ve loved during your winter holidays, previously listed as "Roasted." We’ve updated the name to Crunchy Salted Peanuts to better reflect the traditional preparation and superior crunch that makes them a family favorite.

products.title: Delectable Seekh Kabab
products.description:
What are you waiting for???


Get delicious frozen food at your doorstep now. Delicious appetizer made with ground minced chicken and a handful of spices.
Our soft and succulent Seekh Kababs are made with finest quality Chicken mince with home ground spices to maintain the quality and fresh taste. Tender and juicy Seekh kababs serve as a handy go-to meal when you are busy OR a great way to keep your guests in awe.

For a heavenly taste, fry them in a oiled pan on low flame and enjoy with your favorite chutneys

products.title: Delicious Aalu Samosa
products.description:
Delicious Aloo samosa with a pack of 12pcs

These Aalu Samosas are made with a thin, crispy patti filled with a chunky potato mixture seasoned with mint, coriander, red chili, black pepper, and a blend of spices. The potatoes remain in small pieces rather than mashed, giving the filling a clear texture and a balanced mix of herbs and mild heat. The thin sheets fries to a crisp finish, while the simple, straightforward ingredients reflect a classic aloo samosa profile.

Ingredients:
- Fresh potatoes
- Mint
- Coriander
- Red Chili
- Black Pepper
- Spices

Best to be enjoyed when warm with mint yogurt. A product you will regret not buying.

products.title: Delicious Chicken Samosa
products.description:
"Ok but seriously who could ever get tired of chicken".

Chicken samosa is one of our most basic yet very tasty items. The crispy and juicy chicken samosas are made of the highest quality chicken meat. They are crispy on the outside and moist on the inside with a tad bit of spice. We use fresh oil for deep frying. Besides everything, it becomes extremely tasty. A great appetizing product.

Ingredients:
- Shredded chicken
- Black pepper
- Spices
- Cabbage
- Coriander

products.title: Delicious English Spring Pockets
products.description:
“Get Something Different”
English Spring Pockets is entirely different among its peers. A blend of Sweet & Savory flavors with a fruity twist. A fusion of green peas, corns, assorted fruits & chicken makes it as tempting as it gets.

Ingredients:

  • Chicken
  • Assorted fruits
  • Green peas
  • Corns
  • Spices

products.title: Delicious Pani Puri / Gol Guppay
products.description:
Pani Puri is a fun and tasty snack. It's made of small, round, crispy shells that are hollow inside. These shells are filled with a mix of spicy and tangy water, mashed potatoes, chickpeas, and sometimes tamarind chutney. You pop the whole thing in your mouth for a burst of different flavors all at once. It's a favorite street food that many people love to eat!

PREPARATION:

Fry the given pellets.  First ry with 2 or 3  pellets until it become  completely fry. Do not Fry more than 5  Pellets in one time. 

FOR MAKING  PANI MASALA: Use masala satche  inside with 800 ml of  cold water & mix it  well & leave it for 10  to 15 min. 

For better taste use  Boiled chick peas and  plums paste.

طریقہ استعمال :

پوری بنانے کیلئے پیکٹ میں موجود ٹکیوں کو گرم تیل میں فرائی کریں ۔ پہلے دو تین پوری فرانی کرکے چیک کریں۔ جب تک یہ پوری کی شکل میں نہ آجائیں۔ ایک وقت میں 5 سے زیادہ فرائی نہ کریں۔

مصالحہ بنانے کے لئے پیکٹ میں موجود مصالحے کے ساشے کو 800 ملی لیٹر پانی میں حل کریں اور دس سے پندرہ منٹ کے لئے چھوڑ دیں۔

مزید ذائقہ بنانے کیلئے ابلے ہوئے چنے اور آلو بخارے کی چٹنی کا استعمال کریں۔

اجزاء:

نشاستہ اور آٹا ( گندم اور مکئی)، نمک. چینی، خمیر ، کھانے کا تیل وغیرہ۔

products.title: Delightful Chicken Smoke Samosa
products.description:
This specialty samosa brings the bold, unmistakable flavor of real BBQ. The filling is made from minced chicken that’s smoked to perfection, giving it a uniform, tender texture and a deep, natural smoky aroma. Lightly seasoned to let the smoked chicken shine, the filling pairs beautifully with the crisp, golden samosa shell — creating a satisfying snack that’s rich, flavorful, and irresistibly crunchy.

Ingredients:
- B.B.Q touch Smoky chicken
- Mild flavors.

products.title: Delightful Fajita Pockets
products.description:
"Ok but seriously who could ever get tired of chicken".


Coming your way is chicken mixed with Italian spices, crispy crunchy onion and to top it all of black olives whose flavor goes ranging from salty to mild and sweet. Perfect to enjoy with your family in the evenings while having an exciting match of ludo. The crunchy sound when you take a bite will drive your opponent crazy.


Ingredients:

Chicken

Olives

Capsicum

Onion

Herbs

Assorted Spices

products.title: Dry Fruit Mix Nimko
products.description: A rich blend of sev, peanuts, raisins, and crunchy Almonds coated with mild spices — perfect for gifting or serving guests.

products.title: Green Tea - Peshawari Kehwa
products.description:
<h2 class="docData;DOCY;v5;20480;" style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan lines-together; page-break-after: avoid; margin-top: 8pt; margin-bottom: 4pt; border: none; mso-border-left-alt: none; mso-border-top-alt: none; mso-border-right-alt: none; mso-border-bottom-alt: none; mso-border-between: none;">
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 18pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>Peshawari Kehwa – Green Tea </b></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 18pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>– </b></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 18pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>A Taste that Serves All Day</b></span>
</h2>
<p style="margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 10pt; border: none; mso-border-left-alt: none; mso-border-top-alt: none; mso-border-right-alt: none; mso-border-bottom-alt: none; mso-border-between: none;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;">🌿 <strong data-end="357" data-start="215">Famous across Pakistan yet rooted deeply in Peshawar — where it’s sipped more often than anywhere else — hence the name <em data-end="354" data-start="337">Peshawari Kehwa</em>.</strong> From morning freshness to late-night talks, this kehwa acts as a companion more than a beverage — warm</span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;">, aromatic, and familiar like home. If you’ve ever been to Peshawar, it’s the taste that follows you back — steam rising in winter fog, cardamom in the air, cups refilled before they run empty.</span></p>
<p style="margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 10pt; border: none; mso-border-left-alt: none; mso-border-top-alt: none; mso-border-right-alt: none; mso-border-bottom-alt: none; mso-border-between: none;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;">Made with pure green tea leaves, it offers light natural caffeine for a gentle lift and is known for antioxidants that </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><i>may support</i></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"> wellness and clarity throughout the day. It’s a kehwa people drink casually — not for trends or fancy health claims, but because it feels good, tastes right, and settles naturally into daily routine. A go-to cup for conversation, winters, work breaks, gue</span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;">sts, or simply </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><i>because why not?<br style="mso-special-character: line-break;"><span> </span></i></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"> Because in Pakistan, kehwa doesn’t need an occasion.</span></p>
<h3 style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan lines-together; page-break-after: avoid; margin-top: 8pt; margin-bottom: 4pt; border: none; mso-border-left-alt: none; mso-border-top-alt: none; mso-border-right-alt: none; mso-border-bottom-alt: none; mso-border-between: none;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 14pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>Why People Keep Coming Back to Peshawari Kehwa</b></span></h3>
<h3 style="margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 10pt; border: none; mso-border-left-alt: none; mso-border-top-alt: none; mso-border-right-alt: none; mso-border-bottom-alt: none; mso-border-between: none;">
<span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;">⭐ A daily sipper — </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><i>not just a health tea<br style="mso-special-character: line-break;"><span> </span></i></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"> ⭐ Light caffeine — </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><i>alert without anxiety<br style="mso-special-character: line-break;"><span> </span></i></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"> ⭐ Antioxidants that </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><i>may support wellness<br style="mso-special-character: line-break;"><span> </span></i></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"> ⭐ Warm, aromatic, endlessly refillable<br style="mso-special-character: line-break;"><span> </span> ⭐ A cultural drink — </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><i>not just a product<br style="mso-special-character: line-break;"><span> </span><br style="mso-special-character: line-break;"></i></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 14pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>How to Prepare Peshawari Kehwa (Authentic Method)</b></span>
</h3>
<ol style="padding-left: 40px;">
<li style="list-style-type: decimal;">
<p style="margin-left: 35.43307086614173pt; text-indent: -18pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 10pt; border: none; mso-border-left-alt: none; mso-border-top-alt: none; mso-border-right-alt: none; mso-border-bottom-alt: none; mso-border-between: none;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;">Grind </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>4–5 ilaichi (cardamom pods)</b></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"> into a coarse powder.</span></p>
</li>
<li style="list-style-type: decimal;">
<p style="margin-left: 35.43307086614173pt; text-indent: -18pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 10pt; border: none; mso-border-left-alt: none; mso-border-top-alt: none; mso-border-right-alt: none; mso-border-bottom-alt: none; mso-border-between: none;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;">Bring </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>2 glasses of water (or required amount)</b></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"> to a boil.</span></p>
</li>
<li style="list-style-type: decimal;">
<p style="margin-left: 35.43307086614173pt; text-indent: -18pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 10pt; border: none; mso-border-left-alt: none; mso-border-top-alt: none; mso-border-right-alt: none; mso-border-bottom-alt: none; mso-border-between: none;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;">Add </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>sugar (as per requirement )+ ground ilaichi</b></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"> and let it boil until the sugar fully dissolves.</span></p>
</li>
<li style="list-style-type: decimal;">
<p style="margin-left: 35.43307086614173pt; text-indent: -18pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 10pt; border: none; mso-border-left-alt: none; mso-border-top-alt: none; mso-border-right-alt: none; mso-border-bottom-alt: none; mso-border-between: none;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;">Now add </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>Peshawari Kehwa leaves</b></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"> & </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>Immediately do two things:<br style="mso-special-character: line-break;"><span> </span><br style="mso-special-character: line-break;">• Cover the pot with a lid</b></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b></b></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>• Turn off the stove</b></span></p>
</li>
<li style="list-style-type: decimal;">
<p style="margin-left: 35.43307086614173pt; text-indent: -18pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 10pt; border: none; mso-border-left-alt: none; mso-border-top-alt: none; mso-border-right-alt: none; mso-border-bottom-alt: none; mso-border-between: none;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;">Leave it covered for </span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"><b>3–5 minutes</b></span><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 12pt; color: #000000; mso-style-textfill-fill-color: #000000;"> to lock in aroma and full flavor.</span></p>
</li>
<li style="list-style-type: decimal;">

products.title: Imli Aalu Bukhara Sharbat
products.description:
Imli Aalu Bukhara Sharbat – Organic, Homemade & Naturally Refreshing

Our Imli Aalu Bukhara Sharbat is a traditional Pakistani drink made from pure tamarind (imli) and dried plum (aalu bukhara), prepared at home using natural ingredients only.

It delivers a perfect balance of sweet and tangy flavor, making it an ideal summer drink for families in Lahore. With no artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives, this sharbat offers real homemade goodness in every glass.

Why Choose Our Imli Aalu Bukhara Sharbat?

🌿 100% Homemade & Organic

Prepared in small batches using real fruit ingredients. No chemicals, no synthetic additives.

🍑 Sweet-Tangy Traditional Taste

A refreshing blend of imli and aalu bukhara that satisfies your taste buds instantly.

🌿 Traditionally Digestive

Enjoyed anytime during the day, this traditional drink also helps support digestion and overall comfort.

❄ Natural Cooling Summer Drink

Helps cool the body and refresh the mind during hot weather.

💧 Hydrating & Refreshing

Perfect for daily hydration when mixed with chilled water.\

Ingredients

  • Tamarind (Imli)

  • Aalu Bukhara (Dried Plum)

  • Sugar

  • Salt

How to Prepare

  1. Add 1–2 tablespoons of sharbat concentrate to a glass.

  2. Pour chilled water.

  3. Mix well.

  4. Add ice if desired.

  5. Serve fresh and enjoy.

    Buy Imli Aalu Bukhara Sharbat in Lahore

    Looking for organic homemade sharbat in Lahore?
    KNCA provides fresh stock with reliable local delivery.

    Perfect for:

    • Summer refreshment

    • Iftar drinks

    • Family meals

    • Guest serving

    Order online today and enjoy authentic traditional flavor.

    Frequently Asked Questions

    Is this sharbat homemade?

    Yes, it is prepared in small batches using natural ingredients without artificial additives.

    Is it good for digestion?

    Yes. Imli and aalu bukhara are traditionally known for supporting digestion and are enjoyed as a refreshing drink at any time of the day. Traditionally, some people prefer to enjoy it in the early morning before breakfast, as passed down through generations, while others enjoy it anytime for refreshment.

    Is it suitable for summer?

    Yes, it is a popular cooling drink in hot weather.

    Do you deliver outside Lahore?

    Currently, delivery is available within Lahore only.

    Order Now from KNCA

    Experience the real taste of traditional homemade sharbat with fast and secure delivery in Lahore.

products.title: Lemon Grass Kehwa
products.description:
Lemon Grass Kehwa (Herbal Lemongrass Tea)

Lemon Grass Kehwa is a fresh, naturally aromatic herbal tea made from soft green lemongrass leaves and stalks, loved for its clean citrus lift and calming warmth. Brewed daily as kehwa, it offers a refreshing cup that feels light, soothing and ideal for anyone who enjoys gentle herbal wellness without bitterness or heaviness. Whether you sip it in the evening to unwind, start your day with a cleansing herbal drink, or pair it with meals for digestive comfort — this kehwa blends smoothly into everyday lifestyle. Many people also keep Lemon Grass as a kitchen essential, as it doubles beautifully for cooking, seasoning, and herbal applications alongside its tea use.

Uses & Benefits (As Kehwa + Culinary Herb)

Prepared as Kehwa, Lemon Grass offers a gentle herbal drink that many people enjoy for relaxation, digestion support and stress release. Research suggests it may contain antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and anticancer properties, although results vary and more human studies may be needed for confirmation. Outside of tea, Lemon Grass is also widely used in culinary dishes for its citrusy flavor, and is a natural ingredient in essential oils for soaps, perfumes, and insect-repellents — giving it value beyond the teacup. As an herbal drink, it is generally safe for most individuals, but those with sensitivity should watch for reactions such as dizziness or dry mouth.

FAQ — People Commonly Ask

Q. Best time to drink Lemon Grass Kehwa?

Many prefer it in the morning for digestion and metabolism or after meals for bloating relief. In the evening, it may help calm the mind and body. Since it is caffeine-free, it can be sipped anytime — though those sensitive to diuretic effects should avoid bedtime consumption.

Q. Can Lemon Grass Kehwa help burn belly fat?

It may support metabolic activity. The polyphenols in lemongrass are believed to assist in burning calories, oxidizing fatty acids, and reducing stored fat when paired with a balanced lifestyle. It should not be viewed as a quick-fix, but rather a supportive part of a healthy routine.

Q. Is Lemon Grass Kehwa better than Green Tea?

Both have different strengths. Lemon Grass Kehwa is caffeine-free, citrus-fresh and often enjoyed for relaxation and digestion, while Green Tea (Camellia sinensis) offers caffeine, antioxidants and support for energy and weight management. Choice depends on personal preference and health goals.

Q. How long should I boil it?

Boil a cup of water, pour over lemongrass stalks, and steep for at least 5 minutes for a full aromatic cup of kehwa.

Q. Fresh or dried — which is better?

Fresh works best in stir-fry, curry and bright dishes, while dried is perfect for slow simmering in soups, stews, broths & off-course kehwa because it re hydrates while cooking.

products.title: Mazydaar Premium Chicken Shami kabab
products.description:
If you’ve ever tasted Shami Kabab, you know it’s more than just a patty of tender meat and chana dal. These wholesome creations are packed with Chicken, spices, herbs and the richness of yellow split peas, blended into a silky, flavorful mixture
For many Pakistani households, having a stash of Shami Kebabs in the freezer is a prevalent practice. It’s the perfect solution for unexpected guests, hungry children, or a late night snack. Any Pakistani mom can attest to their value. These kebabs, made with Chicken, spiced lentils, and chopped onions, are incredibly versatile, whether pan-fried or Air Fried. The urge to keep the freezer stocked full is real because life is busy, and having these ready-to-fry Shami Kebabs within arm’s reach brings immense relief.

Instructions to Cook Perfectly

Heat a pan until it’s nice and hot then take the shami kababs out of the freezer to defrost,  Sprinkle 1 to 2 table spoon of oil into the pan ( you can skip defrosting wait & put kababs on pan directly, if time is of the essence) and cook on low heat. Flip the kabas for even cooking for 3 to 5 minutes until golden brown; finally, place on tissue paper to soak the oil.

Serving Ideas

Shami Kababs at Tea / Chai Time 

Tea breaks are most sought after times in which snacks like nimko, sandwiches and offcourse kababs with traditional tomato ketchup or special chutneys.can be served with tea, making tea time most flavorful.

Children School Lunch Box

You can prepare a delicious school lunch for your child by making a sandwich with Shami Kababs, adding sauces or mayo, fresh salad, Cheese and toasted crispy bread (Paratha can be more fulfilling for a grown up), ensuring your child remains happy throughout the day with his tummy full.

The All time great Anda Shami Burger / Bun Kabab

Pakistan's most favorite way to celebrate or party is to create a good old street bun kabab / Andah shami burger, which combines a bun, chutneys, sauce or ketchup, fresh salad, and a fluffy omelet for a truly delightful treat.

Shami Kabab at Breakfast

You can serve Chicken Shami Kabab at breakfast, pairing it with an egg, some leftover salan / Stew and roti for a great healthy and delicious treat.

Shami Kababs at Lunch

You can serve Shami Kababs at lunch with a crispy paratha, on the side of Daal Chawal, or pair it with fresh salad and creamy yogurt for a complete meal.
Another Pairing idea is as a compliment to the fragrant Mutton Pulao or Chicken Pulao to elevate your dining experience with a touch of tradition.

Anytime All the time

Serve Shami Kabab as a versatile snack paired with hot and sour sauce, ketchup, your favorite chutney or tucked into wraps, or rolled in a paratha with a mix of sauces for a quick, satisfying meal.

FAQs

How to Defrost or Cook Shami Kebabs from Frozen

To defrost and cook frozen Shami Kebabs, use a microwave for a minute to thaw slightly and bring to room temperature.
Or if time is of the essence,
you can skip the microwave and directly coat eggs and put kababs on hot oil sprinkled pan. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes while flipping sides until gold brown.

Can I do Egg Coating Before Frying?

Adding egg coating to kabab while frying gives it a better mouth feel and a crispy texture. Eggs coating also prevent the shami kabab from breaking during the fry process. Its just that flipping a patty while coating can be slippery & tricky. 
 
 Reheating Shami Kabab

Using an air-fryer is a great way for reheating Shami Kabab from the fridge, as it preserves the coating and enhances the texture. While pan-frying initially is recommended for the best results.

Is Shami Kabab Healthy

Made with tender minced meat, such as beef or mutton, combined with a blend of lentils, herbs, and aromatic spices, Shami Kababs are both flavorful and nutritious. The lentils provide a boost of plant-based protein and fiber, making them a healthier alternative to many fried snacks.

Can I Air-Fry Shami Kebabs?

Yes, you can air-fry Shami Kebabs by dipping them in egg, then setting your airfryer for 3-4 minutes per side, and adjusting the time if needed for perfect results.

How Long Can I Keep Kababs in the Fridge and Freezer?

Keeping Shami Kabab in Raw & uncooked  form in fridge is not recommended. In Cooked Form these can be kept for 1 to 2 days in fridge.
 Keeping Uncooked/ Non fried  shami kabab in freezer is advised and these can be kept for up to 6 months, if they are stored in an airtight container to maintain freshness.

Can I Use ANY meat variant to Make Shami kabab.

Yes, you can use any meat like chicken thighs breasts, beef chunks/ boti, lamb / Mutton for equally loved results with the right balance of fat.
 
our chicken shami kababs are home crafted and we ensure top quality by not compromising on the ratios and maintaining a consistent standard of production.

These kebabs remain freezer-friendly with no detectable change in texture or taste.

products.title: Peri Bites
products.description:
Homemade frozen peri bites in Lahore, ready to fry at home.

Made with Spicy green chilies and a creamy cheese filling, these peri bites are coated for crunch, frozen fresh, and cooked in minutes.

🧀 What Makes Peri Bites Irresistible?

Each bite is a perfect blend of:
🍗 Juicy, tender chicken for a protein-packed punch
🌶️ Green chili for that fiery kick
🧀 Creamy, melted cheese for rich indulgence
🧂 A special mix of assorted spices for layers of flavor
🔥 Mixed in peri sauce for a bold, zesty finish

💡 Why Choose Our Peri Bites?

✔️ Packed with Flavor: Each bite is loaded with the perfect balance of spice, creaminess, and crunch.
✔️ High-Quality Ingredients: We use only the freshest chicken, premium cheese, and carefully selected spices.
✔️ Perfect for Every Occasion: Whether it’s a party snack, game-day treat, or a quick craving buster, Peri Bites always hit the spot.
✔️ Easy to Serve: Just fry, serve, and enjoy! Ideal for family gatherings, parties, or a solo indulgence

🔍 Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Q: How should I prepare Peri Bites?
A: Simply fry them in a frying pan/pot or air fryer for that perfect crispy texture and melty goodness inside.

Q: Are they suitable for parties?
A: Absolutely! Peri Bites are the perfect finger food for parties, movie nights, or casual get-togethers.

Q: Are Peri Bites spicy?
A: Yes! They have a flavorful spicy kick from green chili and peri sauce, with creamy cheese.

Q: What should I do IF the Peri Bites feel too spicy?
A: If the heat feels too intense, try letting the Peri Bites cool down for a few minutes after frying before serving. Cooling can help mellow out the spiciness and allow the flavors to settle, making each bite more enjoyable. Pairing them with a dip like ranch or yogurt or chatni can also help balance the heat.

🎯 Order Your Peri Bites Today In Lahore

Don’t miss out on the ultimate cheesy, spicy indulgence. Add Peri Bites to your cart now and bring bold, crave-worthy flavor straight to your doorstep!

products.title: Roasted Chana (Bhuna Chana)
products.description:
Enjoy the perfect balance of crunch, nutrition and authentic taste with Premium Roasted Chana (Bhuna Chana / Roasted Chickpeas). Made from premium black chana, this naturally high-protein, high-fiber, low-GI snack is a healthy everyday choice trusted by Pakistani families — ideal for weight-loss diets, diabetics, fitness lifestyles and guilt-free tea-time snacking.

Each serving provides approximately 15–18g of plant-based protein, making it ideal for weight-loss diets, diabetes-friendly eating, and heart-healthy lifestyles.

Carefully roasted using traditional time-tested methods, our black roasted grams with shell are crispy, crunchy, nutty in flavor, and perfect for:

• Tea-time munching
• Ramadan iftar snacks
• Office & school lunch boxes
• Fitness & gym diets
• Night cravings without guilt

⭐ Why Roasted Chana Is Better

• Made from local farmer chickpeas
• High protein, high fiber, low GI snack
• Supports digestion, belly fat reduction & blood sugar control
• Rich in iron, magnesium, potassium & antioxidants
• Helps weight management, immunity & heart health
• Pure, natural & preservative-free

Nutrition, Calories & Protein in Roasted Chana

These Are Approx. Value.

Nutrition Facts

Portion Size 199 g

Amount Per Portion 390
Calories

% Daily Value *

Total Fat 16g 21 %

   Saturated Fat 2.1g 10 %

Sodium 566mg 25 %

Total Carbohydrate 47g 17 %

   Dietary Fiber 13g 46 %

   Sugar 8.3g

Protein 15g 30 %

Vitamin D 0mcg 0 %

Calcium 87mg 7 %

Iron 5mg 28 %

Potassium 500mg 11 %

* The % Daily Value (DV) tells you how much a nutrient in a serving of food contribute to a daily diet. 2000 calories a day is used for general nutrition advice.

"Note: Sodium levels may vary slightly based on roasting batches. For lower-salt preference, enjoy in moderation as part of a balanced diet."

Health Benefits of Roasted Chana (Based on Nutrition Studies)

Low in glycemic index (GI), Roasted Chana contains plant-based protein, natural fiber and essential minerals that are commonly associated in nutrition studies with balanced, health-supportive diets.

  • May help support healthy blood sugar levels due to its low GI and fiber content

  • May assist weight management and appetite control by increasing fullness

  • May support digestion and gut health with natural dietary fiber

  • May contribute to heart-healthy eating patterns

  • Provides plant-based protein, iron, magnesium and potassium for everyday wellness and energy

  • Often included in fitness diets, family nutrition and pregnancy-supportive meal plans as part of a balanced diet

NOTE: Benefits are based on nutritional research on chickpeas. Individual results may vary depending on overall diet and lifestyle.

How to Eat Roasted Chana

  • Eat as a crunchy dry snack

  • Mix with jaggery (gur) for natural energy

  • Add to salads, trail mixes & snack bowls

  • Enjoy with tea, coffee or as Ramadan iftar snack

  • Carry as gym / office / school lunch snack

  • Use as a night snack for weight-loss diets


Additional Uses (When Chickpea is Ground into Chana Flour / Besan)

Chana can be ground into chana flour (gram flour / besan) — which is used as a base ingredient in many foods around the world like :

  • Pakoras & fritters

  • Curries & gravies

  • Mithai & sweets

  • Nimko & namkeen

  • Batters & coatings

  • Sattu drinks & energy mixes

 

FAQs

Is roasted chana healthy?
Yes — it is a low-calorie, high-protein, fiber-rich healthy snack.

Does roasted chana help in belly fat?
Yes — it supports fat loss, digestion, and appetite control.

Can diabetics eat roasted chana?
Yes — it is diabetes-friendly due to low GI and high fiber.

Can roasted chana be eaten daily?
Yes — in moderate amounts.

Is roasted chana better than boiled chana?
Roasted chana is more crunchy, convenient & equally nutritious.

Is roasted chana in English “Roasted Chickpeas”?
Yes — also called Bhuna Chana, Roasted Grams, Black Chana, Bengal Gram Chana.

How to Roast Chana at Home

  • Heat a karahi (pan) and fill it with 1 to 2 kg of salt. (The chana will be roasted directly in this hot salt base.)

  • Take a small handful of whole chickpeas (chana).

  • Sprinkle 1 to 2 tablespoons of water over them.

  • Add a small pinch of haldi (turmeric) for natural color and flavor.

  • Mix lightly so the chana becomes slightly moist.

  • Pour the prepared chana into the hot salted karahi.

  • Keep stirring continuously.

  • Within one minute, the chana will start popping, turning light brown and crispy.

  • The first batch may take 2 to 3 minutes; afterward, each portion roasts in about one minute.

  • Roasting in hot salt does not make chana overly salty.
    It gives the perfect balanced saltiness for great taste, without adding extra salt.

  • Once crispy and lightly browned, your homemade roasted chana is ready to enjoy.

products.title: Savory Beef Samosa
products.description:
Experience the true old-school flavor of a classic Beef Samosa — simple, rich, and unforgettable. Made with minced beef (beef keema), onion, and light spices, this samosa keeps the natural beef taste front and center instead of masking it with heavy masalas.

That signature keema punch sets it apart — richer than chicken, deeper than mutton, and satisfying in a way only real beef can deliver. With a fully cooked filling and a crisp 1-bite shell, it fries golden in minutes.

A timeless choice for beef lovers who appreciate pure, honest flavor.

Ingredients:
- Minced beef
- Onion
- Spices.

products.title: Sundal Sharbat
products.description:
Sundal Sharbat — Cool. Calm. Refreshed.

Say goodbye to heavy, sugary drinks and sip into something naturally refreshing. Sundal Sharbat isn’t just a drink — it’s your secret to staying cool, light, and energized, all with the power of fennel seeds.

Why Everyone’s Talking About Sundal Sharbat?

🌿 Instant Cool Down:
The natural cooling effect of fennel makes every sip feel like a breeze on a hot summer day.

🌿 Gut-Friendly Goodness:
Bloating? Heavy meals? Not anymore. Sundal Sharbat is packed with nature’s own digestive properties to keep your tummy happy.

🌿 Light, Sweet & Oh-So-Refreshing:
A perfect balance of subtle sweetness and fresh fennel flavor — it’s light enough to enjoy any time, yet flavorful enough to crave again.

🌿 Zero Nasties:
No preservatives. No artificial flavors. Just pure, homemade goodness you can trust.

🌿 Tradition in a Bottle:
Inspired by generations of home recipes, we’ve bottled the comforting taste of tradition for today’s busy life.

How Easy Is It?

Just pour a few tablespoons into chilled water or ice-cold milk, give it a stir, and your refreshing Sundal Sharbat is ready in seconds. No prep, no hassle — just pure refreshment.

Ingredients You’ll Love:
Fennel Seeds, Sugar, Natural Flavors — and nothing else.

Sundal Sharbat — When You Need A Cool, Sweet Break That Loves You Back.

products.title: Tasteful Chicken Cheese Samosa
products.description:
Our Chicken Cheese Samosa has a mild, uniform filling inside a thin, crisp wrapper. The minced chicken creates an even texture, and the mozzarella cheese melts smoothly during frying, adding softness without extra heaviness. The filling stays cohesive and balanced. Overall, it produces a clean, consistent samosa with a smooth chicken-and-mozzarella cheese profile.

Ingredients:
Chicken combined with mozzarella cheese & mild spices.

Whether you're a fan of spicy delights or simply love bold flavors, our Dal Moth promises to tantalize your taste buds with every mouthful. So, why wait? Dive in and experience the spicy and flavorful adventure that awaits in every savory bite!

  • Bhallay Pakori.

products.title: Thin Samosa Patti Sheets for Perfect Crispy Samosas – Available in Lahore
products.description:
• 🥟 35–45 Sheets (400g) per pack.

  • 📐 Size: Standard 7.5" x 2.5".

  • 🌟 Ramadan Special: Fresh Daily (Non-Frozen) available!

  • ❄️ Storage: 100% Freezer-safe for long-term use.

  • 🔗 Shop Patti & Sheets Collection for more.

Enjoy thin, flexible Samosa Patti sheets made from high-quality wheat flour. Ready to fry or bake for perfect crispy samosas or square shaped Pockets. Each sheet is easy to handle and ideal for your favorite fillings — whether spicy aloo, savory meat, or creamy cheese. Freshly packed in Lahore by KNCA, order online for delivery or pick up instantly from our Defence Chowk store.

Attribute Details
Weight 400g
Quantity 35–45 sheets
Size Approx. 7.5" x 2.5" per sheet
Usage Frying, baking, air-frying
Storage Keep frozen 


Delivery & Pickup Section

  • Delivery: 1–2 days across Lahore

  • In-Store Pickup: Immediate at Defence Chowk Walton Road.

  • Order Options: Online via website, WhatsApp, or direct store visit

FAQs

Q1: How many sheets should I take out from the freezer at once?
A: Only remove as many as you’ll need. For example, if your filling makes 40 samosas, one pack is enough — don’t thaw extra sheets.

Q2: Can unused sheets be frozen again?
A: Yes, but wrap them tightly in foil or a freezer bag. Proper wrapping helps lock in natural moisture, so the sheets don’t dry out or crack.

Q3: Why does Samosa Patti need moisture?
A: Moisture keeps the sheets soft and flexible, which prevents tearing while folding. If they dry out, they can become brittle and break.

Q4: How can I prevent tearing while folding samosas?
A: Work with moist sheets, handle them gently, and avoid folding too sharply.

Q5: Is it better to finish the whole pack in one go?
A: Yes — using the entire pack at once gives the best results and avoids issues from re-freezing or moisture loss.

Q6: Can I pick up Samosa Patti sheets from your Lahore store?
A: Yes! Immediate in-store pickup is available at Defence Chowk Walton Road, or you can order online for delivery within 1–2 days.

Q7: What is the price of a pack of Samosa Patti sheets?
A: Each 400g pack (35–45 sheets) is priced at Rs 180/-. Available for delivery across Lahore or in-store purchase.

Do’s & Don’ts for Thawing

✅ Keep sheets in packaging while thawing
✅ Thaw at room temperature; oven for 30 seconds if needed
✅ Finish the pack at once for best results

❌ Don’t leave sheets uncovered
❌ Don’t re-freeze multiple times
❌ Don’t fold when still stiff

Need a different size? Explore our full Patti Sheets Collection for more options.

products.title: Yummy Dahi Bhallay
products.description:
Frozen Dahi Bhallay (Dry Form) – Prepare Fresh at Home

These are frozen dahi bhallay in dry form, designed for soaking and preparing fresh at home.

Our frozen dahi bhallay are provided in dry form, specially prepared for customers who prefer making fresh dahi bhallay at home.

Simply soak the bhallay in water, gently squeeze, and add to seasoned yogurt with chutneys and toppings of your choice. Perfect for homemade dahi chaat, family gatherings, and festive occasions.
For a complete step-by-step preparation guide with phulki, pakori, chutneys and masala, see our Bhallay & Pakoriyan collection.

Order frozen dahi bhallay online in Lahore from KNCA and enjoy traditional taste with the convenience of home preparation.
